name: Tutorial: The Scrapheap Awakening
flavor: “The first breath of the Vessel, stripped to its essentials.”
rule: Tutorial Run: no location effects and no faculty effects are active.

name: Malkuth: The Scrapheap Awakening
flavor: “The Vessel stirs in the valley of dead matter. The first breath is thick with the scent of clay.”
rule: Primal Inertia: The first Stall (Undershoot) of this Chapter does not penalize the draw phase.

name: Malkuth: The Whispering Mire
flavor: “A thick, acidic fog clings to the Golem’s joints. Visibility is low, and every step requires precise thermal management.”
rule: Acidic Haze: A player cannot refill their hand if they play an Acid (Green) card, even if the group succeeds or they match the suit.

name: Malkuth: The Shattered Ascent
flavor: “The path turns vertical. Gravity is a constant enemy, and the Golem must divert all power to its joints.”
rule: Gravitational Pull: If no player matches the Terrain suit during a Pulse, the group must immediately add +1 Friction as the Golem struggles to maintain its position.

name: Yesod: The Lunar Reflection
flavor: “The Vessel gazes into the mirror of the moon. Reality ripples as the subconscious takes form.”
rule: Astral Feedback: Using the Akashic Reservoir (Swap) generates +2 Friction instead of 1.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-1 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Yesod: The Astral Crossing
flavor: “The silver cord stretches thin. Every movement requires a leap of faith across the void.”
rule: The Scroll of Raziel: A second Reservoir is manifest. Additionally, the Blind Leap persists: manifest cards face-down before the Sphere’s Law is revealed.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-1 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Yesod: The Weaving of Dreams
flavor: “The Demiurge weaves a web of illusions. To stall is to become entangled in the threads of sleep.”
rule: Entangling Dreams: If the group Stalls (Undershoots), every player must discard one card from their awareness.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-1 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Hod: The Geometric Order
flavor: “The Demiurge tests the Vessel with rigid patterns. In the hall of geometry, only symmetry allows the spirit to pass.”
rule: Symmetric Vibration: If the total vibration is an Even number, reduce Friction by 1 (Minimum 0). If it is Odd, add +1 Friction.

name: Hod: The Unforgiving Logic
flavor: “A cold, crystalline architecture where there is no room for hesitation. Here, Apathy is as destructive as Pride.”
rule: Binary Consequence: Any Stall (Undershoot) result is considered as a Pride (Overshoot).

name: Hod: The Forbidden Prism
flavor: “Reason demands the exclusion of the unknown. In the halls of pure intellect, the shifting nature of the Prism is considered heresy.”
rule: The Labyrinth of Definition: Prism (Jolly) cards lose their variable nature; they are treated as fixed value 0 and provide no Suit resonance.

name: Netzach: The Thicket of False Victories
flavor: “Nature thrives on competition, not cooperation. In this thicket, only the dominant faculty finds the strength to persist.”
rule: The Hollow Victory: On a Success, only the player who contributed the highest value card refills their hand. Others only refill if they matched the Resonant Suit.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-2 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Netzach: The Forge of Unending Desire
flavor: “The fire of passion is boundless and destructive. Without the stabilizing flow of the Astral Waters (Ether) or the shifting essence of the Prism, the vessel will melt under its own heat.”
rule: Ethereal Containment: At the end of every Pulse, add +1 Friction unless at least two Ether (Blue) or Prism (Jolly) cards were manifested in the sum.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-2 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Netzach: The Storm of Shattered Selves
flavor: “The storm seeks to dissolve the individual into the whole. To align too closely with the environment or the collective memory is to lose one's distinct awareness.”
rule: Shattered Identity: The Resonance Rule does not apply in this location.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-2 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Tiphareth: The Communion Core
flavor: “Many streams, one heart. Every faculty offers a fragment to the center before the center speaks for all.”
rule: Unified Manifestation: all players have hand capacity 3. At the start of each Pulse, each non-Conductor passes one chosen card to the Conductor; only the Conductor manifests, up to 3 cards.

name: Tiphareth: The Chaotic Mandala
flavor: “Three Laws resonate at once. Harmony is found not in matching, but in avoiding every imposed pattern.”
rule: Triple Law: reveal 3 Terrain windows each Pulse. The group succeeds only if total matches none of them. Matching any window counts as Overshoot.

name: Tiphareth: Herald’s Strain
flavor: “One voice declares the Law’s tone. Every dissonant response adds strain to the vessel.”
rule: Declared Suit: the Herald manifests first and face-up. Other players must include Herald’s suit (or Prism) among manifested cards, else +1 Friction each.

name: Gevurah: The Crucible of Excess
flavor: “Judgment demands absolute expenditure. A single card is never enough to satisfy the Crucible.”
rule: Escalating Commitment: during Selection, each player may keep adding manifested cards before reveal.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-3 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Geburah: The Pyre of Amplification
flavor: “Each spark feeds the sentence. In the Pyre, one flame is power; many flames are annihilation.”
rule: Cinder Escalation: after summing all manifested values, multiply the total by 2 for each manifested Cinder card (1 Cinder = ×2, 2 Cinders = ×4, 3 Cinders = ×8).
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-3 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Geburah: The Registrar of Severity
flavor: “The Record does not advise—it amplifies what mirrors it.”
rule: Akashic Magnification: each manifested card whose suit matches the Akashic Reservoir suit has its value multiplied by the Reservoir card value before total resolution (Prism Reservoir counts as 3).
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-3 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Chesed: The Inverted Tide
flavor: “Mercy bends flow upside down: Ether and Steam return as burdens before becoming grace.”
rule: Inverted Streams: Ether and Steam manifested values are treated as negative.

name: Chesed: The Mirror of Grace
flavor: “The Law reflects itself onto your manifestation: what matches the Sphere is mirrored and diminished.”
rule: Law Reflection: cards matching the current Terrain suit are treated as negative.

name: Chesed: The Wheel of Benevolence
flavor: “Every success redistributes burden and grace. No faculty remains with the same vessel for long.”
rule: Rotating Mercy: after each successful Pulse, faculties rotate clockwise between players.

name: Binah: The Double Seal
flavor: “Understanding is not a fleeting spark, but a dwelling within the structure. To advance, the vibration must be proven twice.”
rule: The Twin Validation: Each Terrain card requires two consecutive successful Pulses to be overcome. Any Stall or Overshoot resets the count for the current Terrain to zero.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-4 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Binah: The Primordial Sea
flavor: “The Waters of Marah are deep and bitter. In the Great Sea, every action draws from the limited pool of pre-existent Form.”
rule: The Drowning of Form: Any card used in a successful Pulse is removed from the game for the remainder of this Chapter. If a player’s hand cannot be refilled because the deck is empty, the Golem takes 2 Damage to pull discarded cards back into existence.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-4 Sigils, choose 1.

name: Binah: The Palace of Understanding
flavor: “The Mother speaks in a whisper only the Conductor can hear. The rest must trust in the elemental weight of the suits.”
rule: The Conductor’s Burden: Only the player assigned the 'Conductor' Faculty may inspect the full Law Deck at any time (all Terrain cards, exactly as with Akashic Lens). They may only declare the Resonant Suit to the group. No other information (including ranges or future cards) may be shared.
rewards: Sigil Draft: reveal 3 Tier-4 Sigils, choose 1.
